name: shop_hint_packs
description: Three escalating booster packs of the SAME crochet hook: small = one hook; medium = three hooks fanned; large = five hooks fanned with a yarn ball at the base. Richness scales.
prompt_extra: every cell repeats the identical lightbulb hint token from the reference; each subject stays small within its cell with wide empty margins on ALL sides — nothing may touch or cross a cell edge

variants.name: warm
variants.prompt_extra: slightly warmer, cozier tones and a touch more craft detail

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: slightly simpler, more minimal composition with bolder shapes
